mapper.sql: id, name, gender, age, education, work_years, phone, email, expected_salary, job_intention, work_experience, education_experience, status, attachment_url, attachment_name, source, create_time, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: insert into resume (id, name, gender, age, education, work_years, phone, email, expected_salary, job_intention, work_experience, education_experience, status, attachment_url, attachment_name, source, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workYears,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobIntention,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{educationExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{source,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into resume
name,
gender,
age,
education,
work_years,
phone,
email,
expected_salary,
job_intention,
work_experience,
education_experience,
status,
attachment_url,
attachment_name,
source,
remark,
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gender,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{age,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workYears,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{expectedSalary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jobIntention,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{educationExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attachmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{source,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update resume
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=CHAR},
age = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER},
education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work_years = #{workYears,jdbcType=INTEGER},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expected_salary = #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
job_intention = #{jobIntention,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
work_experience = #{workExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
education_experience = #{educationExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attachment_name = #{attachmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source = #{source,jdbcType=TINYINT},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update resume set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=CHAR}, age = #{age,jdbcType=INTEGER}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_years = #{workYears,jdbcType=INTEGER}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expected_salary = #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_intention = #{jobIntention,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_experience = #{workExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education_experience = #{educationExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attachment_name = #{attachmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source = #{source,jdbcType=TINYINT}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into resume (name, gender, age, education, work_years, phone, email, expected_salary, job_intention, work_experience, education_experience, status, source, remark) values
(#{item.name}, #{item.gender}, #{item.age}, #{item.education}, #{item.workYears}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.expectedSalary}, #{item.jobIntention}, #{item.workExperience}, #{item.educationExperience}, #{item.status}, #{item.source}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select:
select
from resume where status = #{status} order by create_time desc
